notes: MARS (Medium Archival Reference Standard) armor — US ARL reference dual-hardness standard. Similar construction to MIL-A-46099C: hard face on ductile backer. Established as cross-lab reference material for ballistic test validation. See ARL-TR-4632.

source.methodology: RHAe per ARL-TR-4632 characterization of MARS reference material. Dual-hardness construction similar to MIL-A-46099C.
